usage: verifyWireGap [-help] [-append] [-area {x1 y1 x2 y2}] [-layers <string>] [-report <string>] [-wireToWire <float>] [ -net <string>] [-wireToBoundary [-chip {v1 v2}] [-core {v1 v2}] [-block {v1 v2}] [-powerdomain {v1 v2}]] [-wireToShape [-ring <float>]]

options.name: -append
options.description: specifies that all previous verifyWireGap settings will be kept

options.name: -block
options.description: Specifies the wire to block gap distance

options.name: -chip
options.description: Specifies the wire to chip boundary gap distance

options.name: -core
options.description: Specifies the wire to core boundary gap distance

options.name: -layers
options.description: Specifies the metal layers to consider

options.name: -net
options.description: The name of power nets that will be checked

options.name: -powerdomain
options.description: Specifies the wire to powerdomain gap distance

options.name: -report
options.description: Specifies the report file for verifyWireGap violations data

options.name: -ring
options.description: Specifies the wire to ring gap distance

options.name: -wireToBoundary
options.description: To check wire to boundary gap

options.name: -wireToShape
options.description: To check gap between wire and some specific shapes

options.name: -wireToWire
options.description: Specifies the wire to wire gap distance
